use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATMENT OF IRON DEFICIENCY ANEMIA IN ADULT PATIENTS WHO HAVE INTOLERANCE TO ORAL IRON OR HAVE HAD UNSATISFACTORY RESPONSE TO ORAL IRON, WHO HAVE NON-HEMODIALYSIS DEPENDENT CHRONIC KIDNEY DISEASE, BY ADMINISTERING FERRIC DERISOMALTOSE
